source: Florida DBPR, Division of Hotels & Restaurants — public inspection extracts (Districts 1 & 2)
filter: Inspections citing Violation 36 — floors/walls/ceilings/attached equipment not properly constructed or clean, or rooms/equipment not properly vented.
